audit_trail.name: Greyscale Conversion
audit_trail.description: Converted BGR input to single-channel greyscale. Colour is irrelevant for ink-on-paper OCR and removing it reduces processing cost by 3×.

audit_trail.name: Bilateral Denoising Filter
audit_trail.description: Applied edge-aware bilateral filter (d=9, σColor=75, σSpace=75). Suppresses paper grain and scanner noise while preserving the sharp ink-stroke boundaries that OCR depends on.

audit_trail.name: CLAHE Contrast Enhancement
audit_trail.description: Applied Contrast Limited Adaptive Histogram Equalization (clipLimit=2.0, tile=8×8) to recover faded ink strokes and compensate for lighting gradients across the document surface.

audit_trail.name: Adaptive Gaussian Binarization
audit_trail.description: Converted to binary using local Gaussian-weighted thresholding (blockSize=15, C=10). Each pixel is compared to its 15×15 local neighbourhood average, isolating ink strokes from yellow staining and uneven lighting that would defeat global thresholding.

audit_trail.name: OCR — Tesseract LSTM (PSM 6, OEM 3)
audit_trail.description: Recognised text at 24% mean confidence. 0% of tokens high-confidence (≥80%). Tokens below 40% confidence dropped from extracted_text to eliminate scanner-border noise.

audit_trail.name: Metadata Extraction
audit_trail.description: Regex entity extraction found 0 date(s), 0 person(s), 0 place(s). Document type: unrecognised.

audit_trail.name: Annotated Image
audit_trail.description: Drew per-word bounding boxes colour-coded green/yellow/red by OCR confidence tier (≥80 / 50-79 / <50).

audit_trail.name: Layout Map
audit_trail.description: Morphological dilation (kernel 15×5, 2 iterations) merged characters into paragraph blobs; contours mark layout regions.

audit_trail.name: Table Detection
audit_trail.description: Morphological line extraction + numeric-alignment heuristic. Found 0 table(s). Note: borderless tables require deep-learning models (future work).
